headline: Stronger Q4 Results and DOE HVAC Wins Might Change The Case For Investing In Trane Technologies (TT)
summary: In recent months, Trane Technologies’ board declared a quarterly dividend of US$1.05 per share payable on June 30, 2026, and the company reported Q4 2025 results that exceeded revenue and earnings forecasts with optimistic guidance for 2026. At the same time, Trane advanced in two US Department of Energy HVAC challenges, with its rooftop units and cold-climate heat pump surpassing efficiency and performance benchmarks, underlining the company’s emphasis on high-efficiency climate...
